title: Expose Ticks command output in Pi RPC mode
description: Smoke testing found that extension commands succeeded in RPC mode but their detailed markdown was only queued as a custom next-turn message, so RPC clients saw notifications but not the plan/status body. Also the compact run widget hardcoded qfs instead of the requested epic id. Emit bounded command output through the RPC setWidget protocol and use the dynamic epic id.
notes: 2026-07-13 09:41 - Verified with python RPC harness: command discovery passed; /ticks-run ixv --dry-run --worktrees exposed xns, tick/ixv/xns, and .ticks-worktrees/xns; /ticks-status exposed status heading.
acceptance_criteria: RPC smoke test receives dry-run output lines containing the requested epic, ready tick, branch, and worktree; summary widget uses the requested epic id.
closed_reason: Completed: RPC mode now exposes bounded markdown via the extension UI setWidget protocol, and the run summary uses plan.epicId instead of hardcoded qfs.
